programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky believes he has picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to discover that aliens are already on Earth and in the process of preparing to take it over.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A pair of losers marry two elderly sisters, thinking they'll inherit their fortune and Beverly Hills estate.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Love at First Bite
programme.desc: After being evicted from his castle in Transylvania, Count Dracula and his assistant Renfield travel to New York to find a woman who the Count believes is the reincarnation of the woman he has loved for all eternity.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: Mother Lode
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of an isolated, crazy miner.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Pamela's Oxen
programme.desc: A woman refuses to give her oxen to General Sam Houston for use in the war against Mexico.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Splinter Station
programme.desc: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Queen of the High Graders
programme.desc: A detective's investigation of a mine robbery starts to derail when he falls for the suspect's daughter.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Devil's Bar
programme.desc: The Bartlett couple arrives in town and stirs up trouble.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Learnin' at Dirty Devil
programme.desc: A teacher steps in when an outlaw influences a youngster.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Yankee Confederate
programme.desc: A Union naval officer tries to curb the activities of a group of Southern sympathizers in California.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Gentle Sword
programme.desc: A woman comes to the rescue of her husband, trapped in a mine by outlaws during the gold rush in California.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Extra Guns
programme.desc: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The White Healer
programme.desc: Lt. Wood is stationed in Arizona Territory during an Apache uprising and illness breaks out among the Natives.

programme.title: Valhalla: Legend of Thor
programme.desc: When Thor and Loki seek refuge in the home of mortals, the youngest son fails to heed a warning from the gods.

programme.title: Scott of the Antarctic: Scott of the Antarctic
programme.desc: The story of British explorer Robert Falcon Scott's 1912 expedition and his quest to be the first to reach the South Pole.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Five years after the tragic death of her boyfriend, a woman arrives on the doorstep of his family claiming she is pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Clover Bend
programme.desc: An LA cop whose wife is killed in a shootout moves back to his hometown, trying to rebuild a life for himself and his children. Unbeknownst to him, his wife's killers are seeking revenge for one of their own who was also killed in the shootout.

programme.title: Saving Emily
programme.desc: When her daughter is diagnosed with leukemia, a woman (Alexandra Paul) and her new husband get pulled into the whirlwind life of her seedy ex-husband who tries to extort money from them in exchange for his life-saving bone marrow.

programme.title: Hangar 18
programme.desc: After a UFO crashes in Arizona, due to a space collision with a NASA satellite launch, the U.S. government tries to cover-up the incident for political reasons. Starring: Darren McGavin, Robert Vaughn, Gary Collins, James Hampton, Pamela Bellwood

programme.title: Rise Of The Fellowship
programme.desc: What if The Lord of the Rings wasn’t just a story? What if it happened to you? Randall Dooley and his friends are outcasts at school, spending most of their time playing online games. After Randall is set up for a crime he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Frank Herbert's Dune: Episode 1
programme.desc: On order of the emperor, Duke Leto Atreides moves his family from his home planet Caladan to another planet, Arrakis, also known as Dune. After an attack on their stronghold, his son Paul and his concubine flee into the desert.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E: A.R.C.H.I.E
programme.desc: Isabel has recently lost her parents in a car accident. Feeling alone and friendless, she befriends a stray robot dog named A.R.C.H.I.E. who can talk, run at blinding speed and has super strength and x-ray vision and they become fast friends.

programme.title: Windstorm
programme.desc: Rebel teen Mika encounters a beautiful, wild stallion named Windstorm at her grandmother's riding school and learns she can communicate with horses.

programme.title: The BFG: The Original Movie

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors

programme.title: The Amazing Transparent Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist invents an invisibility formula. He plans to use the formula to create an army of invisible zombies.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silver Curtain
programme.desc: Behind the "silver curtain" spray from a fountain, a man is found dead with a knife in his back. Colonel March is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Error At Daybreak
programme.desc: A shady businessman collapses on an oceanside jetty, the apparent victim of a heart attack, but March discovers blood and a needle near the body.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Hot Money
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, the suspect, never out of sight, goes to his office where he locks himself in. But when the police search, there is no money!

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Missing Link
programme.desc: A skull, known as the Damascus man, is stolen from a museum and Colonel March's life is imperiled trying to solve the case.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A role-playing game turns lethal, with one player falling victim to a bona fide killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate two seemingly unrelated deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate the murder of a lab tech that has similarities to a 1950's cold case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac has a choice to make as he lies in limbo between life and death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a firefighter dies, Mac discovers similarities to a string of arson cases.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man opens fire during a political rally, injuring a senatorial candidate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team recreate a crime scene that has been washed away.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A roller derby arena provides the backdrop for a grisly crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A teenage boy shoots up LVPD headquarters and holds Russell hostage.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs race to discover who shot Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the brutal murder of a therapist's daughter.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: An unexplained illness that is affecting random citizens of Las Vegas baffles the CSIs.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A brutal motorcycle gang murder takes place in a biker bar.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A cache of missing chips from a closed down casino turn up in Vegas and a string of murders follow, leading Langston to use deadly force for the first time in his career as a CSI.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Grissom leads a group of college students on a tour of CSI, the dead speak while the CSIs investigate, each narrating their own case

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop a sabotaged runaway subway train with Paige and Ralph on board. Also, in his attempt to impress Happy, Toby has his first boxing match.

programme.title: Scorpion: Area 51
programme.desc: To help fund Walter's research into saving his sister's life, Team Scorpion takes a lucrative job for the CIA to find a top-secret aircraft in the mysterious Area 51.

programme.title: Scorpion: US vs. UN vs. UK

programme.title: Scorpion: Arrivals And Departures
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover at a university to find a hacker who infiltrates the Federal Reserve and threatens to collapse the world economy.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rains create a large crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out an entire town in its wake.

programme.title: For Colored Girls

programme.title: Eve's Bayou
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a prosperous Louisiana family in 1962 after a girl (Jurnee Smollett) catches her father (Samuel L. Jackson) with another woman.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, is in mourning for his dead father, the king. He's also disturbed by how quickly his mother, Gertrude, has remarried.

programme.title: The Spanish Gardener
programme.desc: Rather undiplomatic British diplomat Harrington Brande takes up his new post in Spain accompanied by his son Nicholas He becomes increasingly jealous of the relationship that develops between his son and the Spanish gardener hired for his estate.

programme.title: Painted Boats
programme.desc: For generations the Stoner and Smith families have lived and worked on the canals of Britain. But now the younger generation long to break away and discover life outside the barges.

programme.title: Medium: Labor Pains

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: After a desperate father puts his own life on the line to save his daughter's life, Sgt. Parker is forced to confront his feelings about his own child

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When the SRU arrives at a hostage situation at a bank, Sgt. Parker faces one of his toughest negotiations when the robber isn't who he thought.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.desc: Monica becomes a home care nurse to help a dying man let his youngest daughter know that he's not her real father

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted

programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Idol Worship

programme.title: Andromeda: The Right Horse

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Home is Where the Heart is

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Steer Trek

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Brave J

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: You Can Leave Your Heart On

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Scabby Monkey

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders enter a world on which they must remain for 27 hours, but find themselves running for cover in a bomb-targeted alley.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After the Sliders check into a haunted hotel, they become ghosts trapped in a howling vortex between two parallel worlds.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Vincent Tabak
programme.desc: When landscape architect Joanna Yeates disappeared after work Christmas drinks, the nation was gripped by the search for her. Tragedy struck on Christmas day morning when her body was found in a snow-covered lane. But who had killed the young woman

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Blackout Episode

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Ddong Chim

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Long Way To Tip-A-Roy

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Match Made In Hell

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ball 'N' Jane

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.17
programme.desc: Lying to the police about suicidal behavior, cheating with the babysitter, and feeding a gambling addiction are allegations estranged parents fight over and deny.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.238
programme.desc: A woman sues her older daughter over a case involving her emancipated teenager. Ex-lovers dispute car payments, insurance, and property return.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.160

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.80
programme.desc: Teenager left with mess and suspected vandalism by ex-roommate, involving seven-layer dip under mattress and thermostat set to 90 degrees. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for unpaid rent and share of vacation; he countersues, alleging she damaged door and wall.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.199
programme.desc: A teen DD falls asleep at the wheel, totaling a car after giving drunk minors a ride. Co-workers moving in together face bed mix-ups, pet issues, and a broken lease.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.235
programme.desc: A woman sues her sister's ex for repossessing a Chevy Yukon; he alleges stolen tags. Exes argue over a bite mark and sue for car damages, a lease, and unpaid vet bills.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.256
programme.desc: A young woman sues ex-business partner for investment return and legal fees. Another sues ex-friend for VW Jetta balance, disputing key handover. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for utility bills, deposit, and debt.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.179
programme.desc: An angry man backs into a neighbor's car after receiving a nasty note from his lover, blaming her for the damages. A teenager jumps on a car to avoid a pit bull, but doubts arise when he admits the car belonged to someone who owed him money.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old girl breaks up with her abusive boyfriend, he snaps and breaks into her bedroom to attack her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance
programme.desc: Attorneys work to get a death row inmate who confessed to a crime he didn't commit out of prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghosts of Greenwich
programme.desc: A report on the murder of 15-year-old Martha Moxley in Greenwich, Connecticut and the new developments in Kennedy family member Michael Skakel’s efforts to overturn his 2002 murder conviction of Moxley.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The 2017 murder of famed hairstylist Fabio Sementilli who was found stabbed to death by his pool in Los Angeles. At first, police believed he was the victim of the “knock-knock” burglars, a ring targeting Hollywood celebrities.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Justice For Sheila?
programme.desc: This report offers fresh insight into the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, a Sarasota, Florida mother of quadruplets who was killed in front of her children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The investigation of the September 24, 1988 sexual torture-murder in Louisville, Kentucky, of Brenda Sue Schaefer.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Trial
programme.desc: Josef Varsh plans to put an American on trial on false charges, discredit the West, and gain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Carriers
programme.desc: Enemy agent Janos Passik is preparing to train 200 foreign agents to infiltrate the U.S. and engage in some form of bacteriological warfare.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Short Tail Spy
programme.desc: A defector has been targeted by two rival groups from the same foreign country. The team is to discredit the younger group, so that the U.S. can more easily handle the old-line group.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Legacy
programme.desc: The IMF must get hold of a hoard of Nazi gold through four young men, sons of Hitler's top aides, who are sent to Switzerland to meet for the first time and pool their parts of the "puzzle" together.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Reluctant Dragon
programme.desc: Dr. Cherlotov, a scientist of an enemy power, failed to defect to the West when his wife did. Now that he has developed a cheap, effective anti-ballistic system, the IMF is ordered to get him out.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rolf Harris

programme.title: Wildest Middle East: Arabia: Land of Illusions

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Vietnam: Phoenix from the Ashes

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Hunters of Noah's Ark

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Alien Hunters

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status

programme.desc: This 3,000 kilometre journey takes us to legendary oriental metropolises.

programme.title: Expedition Europe

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Judgment Day

programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: From The "Protection Squadron" To The SS State.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The Executioner: Reinhard Heydrich

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The Waffen-SS

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Three’s a Charm

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Triple Crossed

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Trifecta
programme.desc: It's week 13 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season and, with only three weeks left to fish, and the number one position on the line, every Gloucester captain is desperate to stack the deck with bluefin.

programme.title: Wardens: Walleye and Women
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol walleye anglers on the Detroit River and a DNR class focuses on getting more women into the outdoors.

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Conservation Officers

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Caviar

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Camper

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Yellowstone
programme.desc: Wardens in Region 5 work their way up the Yellowstone River with a jet boat checking fly fishing outfitters while coming across a boat accident along the way. Then it's over to Region 1 for firearms training.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Antelope Dummy
programme.desc: With Pronghorn antelope populations dwindling, Wardens of Region 7 run a decoy sting the day before the season begins but the real problem arises with trespassing on the opener. Then Region 4 Warden Bryan Golie has a potential poaching call.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Cascade

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Blackfoot
programme.desc: Region 2 wardens are responding to a Tip Mont call with multiple elk down in grizzly country. Upon arrival, one elk & the suspect are missing. In the meantime, wardens in Region 7 have shots fired during a decoy sting.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Spotted Dog
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Mac Pass
programme.desc: This week our Wardens receive a Tip-Mont call about a few illegally taken elk and pursue the the suspects.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Paddlefish

programme.desc: Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair? Binky find out that his real name isn't Binky--it's Shelley?!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and D.W. Clean Up/The Long, Dull Winter
programme.desc: Arthur just might make it to Happy Crazy Wow Day at the park--if he and D.W. can work together to clean their rooms! Then, Arthur and the gang realize they are suffering from the January doldrums brought on by an acute lack of holidays.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All About Me
programme.desc: Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing ball in the park. Barney helps them learn that trying something new can also be fun. Baby Bop prepares a special picnic for BJ, but much to his surprise, it consists mostly of her favorite foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron!
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's “soul” is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Break Through
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to break through the energon grid and then later have to go underground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Distribution
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Omega Train
programme.desc: As the Autobots split up, they join with other rebels to find and free the Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Decepticon Army
programme.desc: Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunited with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ironhide Team
programme.desc: Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. When the Terrorcons entered the super energon, their size grew.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Formidable
programme.desc: Primus is still snoozing. When Sixshot overloads the grid, a huge explosion destroys almost all the autobots. Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron Terror
programme.desc: Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Destructive Power
programme.desc: Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Spark
programme.desc: Big Galvatron vs. Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's “puny” remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Sun
programme.desc: Unicron is the “force that drives the universe” and Primus uses the super energon, the autobots band together and give their combination sparks to Optimus, Galvatron wakes/becomes Unicron again.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Held captive by the brawling Timbercats, Kipo and her pals must find their leader, Yumyan Hammerpaw, to avoid becoming cat food.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: All four Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies watch some children joining in with Debbie. Laa-Laa makes up a song, which makes the other Teletubbies run away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk in sideways, then run off to watch a little boy play cricket with his dad. In Teletubbyland,Tinky Winky runs away with Laa-Laa’s ball. Laa-Laa chases after him, through the house, over the hills and behind the trees.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy & Laa-Laa hug and dance and then join the others to watch some children and Andy Brown play catching leaves in Autumn. T

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children go to the woods to see some bluebells. Po is walking in Teletubbyland when a bluebell appears. Po shows Laa-Laa the bluebell and then one by one more and more bluebells appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky is looking for the other Teletubbies. He can’t see any of them so he shouts out ‘Big Hug’ and all the Teletubbies come running for a big hug.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some girls spend the day picking and sorting vegetables in their nannies garden. Tinky Winky sets the table for Tubby Toast, but when he calls the other Tubbies, Noo-Noo tidies it all up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run indoors and then run out again to watch Andy Brown and Georgina wash a baby elephant. Laa-Laa and Dipsy have a messy accident.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children playing in the rain. Dipsy steps in a puddle. Three magic ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa comes out of the house does a little dance and calls the other Teletubbies for a Big Hug. They stop to watch 2 little girls making a pretend friend, out of old clothes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies dance a Bumps-a-daisy dance and then watch some children decorating lots of boxes to make a big caterpillar. A Jack in a Box appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s building a ‘drying tunnel’ for drying Annie seaweed. Muck passes Mr Beasley who’s having a spot of bother with his washing. He decides to build Mr Beasley a drying tunnel for his washing.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building a bunkhouse for Farmer Pickles guests The Pickers! Micky, Vicky and Little Ricky are helping with the sunflower harvest. The cabin is to be made of logs so Lofty’s job is very important today, lifting and laying the logs.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is erecting a tent to accommodate some newcomers to the valley. Mr Bentley is organising everything, but unfortunately leaves his phone with Spud who promptly declares himself ‘Mr Bentley’s Assistant’.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Bob and the team build Annie Pickles new seafront house, Muck is worried that Scoop is a better digger than he is and decides to prove himself with a sandcastle competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. The job is straightforward, but the finished result looks rather plain, so Bob offers to get some tiles from JJ’s yard to decorate it. While Bob is gone, Mr Sabatini demonstrates his soccer skills to Dizzy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop has spent the night in Bobsville and is off back to Sunflower Valley early in the morning. Benny is desperate to go too so Scoop promises to come back and take him as soon as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Train enthusiast Mr Bentley is away for the day and, in his absence, Mrs Bentley decides to surprise her husband by asking Bob to build him a brand new model railway in the shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s job today is to repair an eroded riverbank. There will be LOTS of mud to shift and Muck is beside himself with excitement. Before Muck can get stuck in, Bob needs him to fetch some equipment from JJ’s.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and crew are demolishing an old barn for Farmer Pickles, but as Lofty tests his demolition ball he accidentally damages one of the pillars at the entrance to Bob’s yard. Wendy offers to stay and repair this while Bob gets on with the day’s job.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Don Kemp Story, Moss Beach Ghosts, Kerouac Fan, Update: Marsh, NY State Serial Rapist and Baby's Breath.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Armored Car Killings, Fumbles Robber, Dahlia/Torso Connection, Tunnel of Cocaine and Black Hope Curse (Pts. 1 & 2).

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Undesirable Desiree, Bermuda Triangle, Arlington Murder, Update: Hotel Balcony Death and Rainy Day.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Trailer Terror, Lost in Jamaica, Ghost Boy and Yager Shyster & UD.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: What Haunts Inside?
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension is an exciting paranormal show that takes investigations to a whole new level.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special (2019)
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension is an exciting paranormal show that takes investigations to a whole new level.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of the Pumping Pit
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension head to Wigan and investigate Aspull Pumping Pit. Built in 1871, the location is currently in ruins and is home to a whole host of paranormal activity. Ghostly entities make contact tonight, in an unforgettable paranormal investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: City Hell
programme.desc: Onthis episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is hauntingthe building.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frighternity
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to investigate the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery...and his ghost still roams the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Ghost of a Marine
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Family of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: With the night getting ever more active and poltergeist activity growing, something seems to target one of the team. And what activity could make Glen state ‘’that is paranormal’’.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Tired from this long investigation, the team continue where one of them realises that the idea to investigate along was a mistake, but can the others get there in time. And something has a final message for the team as they leave.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Ruthin Castle
programme.desc: Yvette & Karl investigate a jewel in the crown of Great Britain, Ruthin Castle. They take on the infamous room 222 and soon realise they are not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Chillingham Castle
programme.desc: Karl & Stuart take on one of the Most Haunted rooms in this ancient castle. Whatever is there, seems desperate to make itself known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Leeds Town Hall
programme.desc: Karl ventures alone into the underneath Leeds Town Hall into the dark prison cells that is said to be haunted by a plethora of unhappy spirits, one doesn’t seem happy that Karl is there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hodroyd Hall
programme.desc: Karl & Stu investigate the attic of Hodroyd Hall, and soon become witness to the many strange occurances. What or who is trying to make contact?

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Motorcycle, Blind Man's Dog, Deer Hunters, Tribal Curse, The Card Game.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Connie, Positive I.D., Trucker, Cook Out, The New House.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dorm, The Child Artist, The Weatherman, Sit-Down Comedian, Room 245.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Spring has dawned and the birds have arrived, but a pigeon settles in the birdhouse near Bear's house. Masha is obviously more than happy to look after him, making him her new pet.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has made a new purchase: he has bought a brand new motorcycle. Now, as a cool biker, he plans on impressing She-Bear, but she does not seem to like him or his motorcycle very much.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a nice summer's day Bear, as usual, goes fishing and Masha follows alongside. But the fishing trip didn't quite work out: the forest dwellers made a beach at Bear's favourite spot. Masha is glad to have the opportunity to swim.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has lost her peace because of the ripe, appetising acorns growing right above her little snout. To get the desired but inaccessible delicacy, she must jump above her head or simply learn how to fly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, and the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favourite team. However, Masha gets bored while waiting for a goal so she goes outside looking for one.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha becomes a personal trainer to a group of bees who are eating too many sweets.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha and the Bear argue over which colour is the most beautiful and a wall grew between them. Now the former friends set off in search of new friends, all of which turns into an exhausting competition.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When forest orderlies are powerless, dealing with a real epidemic is not an easy task. However, Masha gets down to business, which means everything will work out with the main thing being perky laughter.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie, but this time the roles are distributed differently. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Rosie tries to endure mother's everyday life.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha finds someone's umbrella in the forest and decides that she needs to return it urgently. After a fun search, the owner of the umbrella is found, but for some reason, they are still dissatisfied.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ever-hungry Wolves managed to unhook a huge tank for transporting live fish from the train. But there is a strange passenger among the fish.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's closet is full of strange and wildly interesting things. Masha and Panda find a very interesting thing there, which becomes a real puzzle for them.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The clouds look airy and similar to different sweets, probably very tasty. Masha and the Bear decide to take to the skies and try the airy dessert.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has a herbarium and Bear has a collection of rare stamps. Masha wants to collect something, but she just cannot figure out what exactly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear is going on a romantic date with the Female Bear. The picnic promises to be perfect because all there are fragrant lilacs all around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy and Fred stumble upon a peculiar well that appears to grant wishes. With Mr Tree's guidance, they discover that the well conceals a network of tunnels, allowing underground access to all the most significant locations in Tulipop.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends' picnic on Turtle Islands disappears mysteriously. They return to Tulipop with empty tummies and an unexpected stowaway!

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy plans to bake a cake for her friends and decorate the table with flowers. She ventures out to pick some blooms, but upon returning home, peculiar events begin to unfold in the kitchen.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The group of friends sets out in search of the best pumpkins, some for baking a cake and others for decoration. Although they intend to stay together, Gloomy inadvertently wanders off and becomes lost.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred encounters some small creatures who have lost their homes and asks his friends to help find them a new one. Through her research in a book, Bubble discovers that the creatures' original home is made of gold thread.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends are gathering berries to bake a delicious cake when, deep in the forest, they encounter a little yodelot who has lost his way home.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Grumpkin prepares a Troll Feast, but his friends can't eat troll food as it is full of weird troll ingredients. How do they tell him without hurting his feelings?

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy surprises her friends with an unusual task of looking after a little dragon they know. What appears to be a simple job of putting the dragon to sleep turns out to be far more challenging than any of them had anticipated.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy has concocted a magical potion that creates enormous soap bubbles. She and her friends succeed in getting inside one. However, Bubble loses control and finds herself unable to stop or escape.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: After the rain, Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy are keen to see the rainbow, but they notice the yellow colour is missing. They decide to investigate the origin of rainbows and discover that in Tulipop, Jellies are responsible for creating them.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends decide to spend the night with Mr Tree under the stars. Fred, however, is terribly afraid of the dark. Despite his inability to sleep, he manages to overcome his fear with the help of his friends.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is reluctant to go outside and play due to the rain, prompting Gloomy to seek a solution. Despite his best intentions, Gloomy inadvertently creates a mixture of sun, rain and snow.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Bubble soar through the sky, astride two butterflies, whilst poor Gloomy is forced to remain on the ground. However, determined to join his friends, Gloomy uses his potion to enlarge a firefly to gigantic proportions.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy's magic makes butterflies enormous, leading to an unexpected ride. Fred and Bubble fly away on giant butterflies, while Gloomy must make do with a slow-moving, lumbering glowbug.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maya the Mermaid's musical practice causes problems with her friend Octavius the Octopus. The two get into a disagreement, and Fred and Gloomy must help mend a friendship.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends hear music from the Forgotten Forest and feel glum. They discover its source and realise that they must cheer up the Weeping Willow to stop its sad music from affecting everyone.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: In the forest, a melody so sorrowful resonates, casting melancholy over all who hear it. The source is Willow, a weeping willow abandoned by his group. Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy offer to play and sing alongside him, lifting his spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends clean up their houses for the Midwinter Munchkin on Midwinter's Eve. While the others get ready, Gloomy's messy house may cause the Midwinter Munchkin to skip his visit.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tulipop and the friends decide to visit Grumpkin. Poor Grumpkin cannot come outside to play. Gloomy and his friends decide to help him spend a day in the sun and thanks to a magic potion they will solve the situation.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is in the swamp and makes friends with a mud monster. Gloomy, Bubble and Maddy are a little scared of this little creature but soon they realise that he is funny and friendly.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Gloomy decide to go to an unexplored territory of Tulipop. Despite their fear of the dark, they encourage each other and discover a beautiful lagoon populated by small lava spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop

programme.title: Tulipop

programme.desc: The owner of a popular bar is killed and robbed.

programme.desc: Two people are killed with a gun printed from a computer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team use the art of interrogation when a beloved off-duty NYPD officer dies.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a wealthy racehorse owner.

programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it.

programme.title: The Ape
programme.desc: Dr. Bernard Adrian is a kindly mad scientist who seeks to cure a young woman's polio. He needs spinal fluid from a human to complete the formula for his experimental serum.

programme.title: Return of the Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite muck-encrusted plant-man is back in this tongue-in-cheek action-adventure which was the sequel to the original cult classic Swamp Thing and based on the award-winning D.C. Comics series. Starring: Heather Locklear, Louis Jourdan

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's determined to get married and proposes to a Jewish girl on their first date.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt secretly elopes after one date with a girl from work, Sarah.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie and Eric have a disastrous Jewish dinner with Matt's "future" in-laws.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary returns to Buffalo to start a new career path as a flight attendant.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric snoops to find out if Matt and Sarah are already married.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus Haggen and a trail partner are cleaned out in a poker game by a man who is later found stabbed to death.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A rowdy clan of hunters, a father and three sons, assault a harmless carpenter, injuring his hand and jeopardizing his livelihood.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Marriage-shy Festus Haggen faces matrimony when his pretty cousin Mayblossom travels all the way from Texas by mule.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A wanted slayer handcuffed to an unconscious Matt Dillon, claims that he, not Dillon, is the U.S. Marshal.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The life of a small girl is endangered because she is the only witness to the shooting of her mother.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A prisoner is broken out of prison by a wealthy gangster so he can mastermind a $10 million robbery of the Honolulu Diamond Exchange.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Almost-perfect counterfeit plates for U.S. twenty dollar bills are desperately sought, not only by American but by various international agents as the ultimately successful trail leads to Hawaii where Five-O must deal with murder, treason and doublecross.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Almost-perfect counterfeit plates for U.S. twenty dollar bills are desperately sought, not only by American but by various international agents as the ultimately successful trail leads to Hawaii where Five-O must deal with murder, treason and doublecross.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: An investigation by Five-O reveals that a munitions' dealer has arranged for the kidnapping of his own wife so that he can induce a beleaguered government to pay a higher price for an arms shipment.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A combat hero, returning from Vietnam, is found dead under mysterious circumstances, and McGarrett and his Five-O unit find their investigation is obstructed for some unknown reason by Army Intelligence.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is on the trail of thieves using high-level Navy tactics to steal the 18th-century treasure.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton find themselves right back where they were seven years ago -- up against a top-level, world-class assassin whom they believed dead.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to rescue an American cargo pilot being held on espionage charges in Central America.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Rowdy Yates, sent to collect payment on 300 head of cattle, meets a little old "grandma" with larceny on her mind.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A pitchman's estranged wife agrees to help him raise money for the family of a drover who died while saving the pitchman's life.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A starving boy inadvertently causes his sister, married to an Indian-hating Army officer, to reveal that she is an Indian.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Three drovers, imprisoned for trespassing by an exiled Prussian count, try to Americanize the nobleman and his fellow immigrants.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Mushy's attempts to save his 15-year-old cousin Posie from the clutches of a gambler ultimately involve all the drovers.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.desc: When landscape architect Joanna Yeates disappeared after work Christmas drinks, the nation was gripped by the search for her. Tragedy struck on Christmas day morning when her body was found in a snow-covered lane. But who had killed the young woman

programme.title: Killer Britain: Lewis Daynes

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Barnyard

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder Under A Blue Moon
programme.desc: Each episode of Murder Masterminds immerses viewers in the emotions and mystery of a homicide, using interviews, recreations and dramatic police dash/body cam videos to tell a tale of murder and deception.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Kentucky Hills
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers called 911 to report that she had killed her boyfriend in self-defense after he attacked her. But investigators soon learned he was planning a date with another woman, and alleged Shayna killed him in a jealous rage.

programme.title: Moesha: The “Short” Story

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 112

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 2

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 221
programme.desc: Can a gun fire lethally if its barrel is bent? Can tape measures and wallets stop bullets? Will a shotgun shell on the tip of a wooden spear detonate if jabbed into an attacking animal?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.desc: Dr. Watson and the inspector are led to a little shop when Holmes goes missing.

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes helps to track down a killer who leaves clues next to the women he kills.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A school boy vandalizes church steps with faculty names, that are then later found dead.

programme.desc: Ramsay tests the chefs' ability to identify flavours and ingredients by asking them to re-create one of his specialties, but a contestant becomes overwhelmed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ambushed
programme.desc: A man helps a new detective figure out who murdered his father.

programme.desc: In 2012, young Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter was found dead execution-style by his neighbour outside his home. With no forensic evidence or witnesses, detectives attempt to use surveillance footage to catch Porter's killer.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Sea Monster Hunters
programme.desc: Legend Hunters search the waters of British Columbia, Canada to discover the truth behind the creatures of the deep.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: For 2000 years, seekers have hunted Noah's Ark, believed to save Earth from biblical flood wrath. US creationists seek it on Turkey's Mount Ararat, aiming to refute evolution. This documentary tracks three Christian explorers whose searches ended sadly.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1938, Nazi Germany annexed Austria. Hitler seized the Spear of Destiny, a Roman spearhead believed to hold power from Christ's crucifixion. He paraded it in Nuremberg to assert authority, but by 1945, amid Germany's ruin, the spear had vanished.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Richard Knight, an actor and laborer, became obsessed with Captain Kidd's treasure. He found clues in old maps and located a potential site in Communist Vietnam's Hon Tre Lon. Despite risks, he and Fred Graham journeyed there, only to be captured.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: EARTH´S EVIL TWIN
programme.desc: Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Shore To Shore
programme.desc: Our seafaring nature has translated well to the space age, seeking to sail out into the unknown in search of riches of one kind or another.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS
programme.desc: Imaging a black hole was a breakthrough in astronomy, now with the new satellite IXPE high energy telescope we will be looking at some of the most dramatic, and most violent objects in the universe: Colliding Black holes and Neutron Stars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift
programme.desc: New heavy lift rockets are taking to the sky. Falcon Heavy, SLS, Arianne 6 and Vega C rockets are primed to begin the next phase of space expansion.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: Expedition Europe
programme.desc: The true legacy of Columbus is biological, and it created one world out of two.

programme.title: Expedition Wallacea
programme.desc: Young naturalist Alfred Wallace was mystified: why were the flora and fauna of Bali and Lombok so radically different?

programme.title: Gold Rush Ghost Ships
programme.desc: John Pollack and his team from the ‘Institute of Nautical Archaeology’ investigate this only remaining ship of the gold rush which was found underwater to date.

programme.title: Great Moments in Evolution: The Miracle of Life
programme.desc: It all began with a single cell. In the course of almost four billion years, this one cell evolved into the diversity of life that exists on the planet today.

programme.title: Great Moments in Evolution: Secrets of Survival
programme.desc: There were five great waves of mass extinction in the history of life. The biggest disaster struck around 250 million years ago.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Rainforest

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: To Love and to Cherish
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bustin' with Justin
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem - Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Run Fugitive, Run
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Vegas or Bust
