programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy's friends arrive with some mysterious fragments they have recently discovered. Meanwhile, she is occupied in the kitchen, attempting to follow a recipe. Unfortunately, something goes awry with her culinary efforts.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy and Fred stumble upon a peculiar well that appears to grant wishes. With Mr Tree's guidance, they discover that the well conceals a network of tunnels, allowing underground access to all the most significant locations in Tulipop.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends' picnic on Turtle Islands disappears mysteriously. They return to Tulipop with empty tummies and an unexpected stowaway!

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy plans to bake a cake for her friends and decorate the table with flowers. She ventures out to pick some blooms, but upon returning home, peculiar events begin to unfold in the kitchen.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The group of friends sets out in search of the best pumpkins, some for baking a cake and others for decoration. Although they intend to stay together, Gloomy inadvertently wanders off and becomes lost.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred encounters some small creatures who have lost their homes and asks his friends to help find them a new one. Through her research in a book, Bubble discovers that the creatures' original home is made of gold thread.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends are gathering berries to bake a delicious cake when, deep in the forest, they encounter a little yodelot who has lost his way home.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Grumpkin prepares a Troll Feast, but his friends can't eat troll food as it is full of weird troll ingredients. How do they tell him without hurting his feelings?

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy surprises her friends with an unusual task of looking after a little dragon they know. What appears to be a simple job of putting the dragon to sleep turns out to be far more challenging than any of them had anticipated.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy has concocted a magical potion that creates enormous soap bubbles. She and her friends succeed in getting inside one. However, Bubble loses control and finds herself unable to stop or escape.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: After the rain, Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy are keen to see the rainbow, but they notice the yellow colour is missing. They decide to investigate the origin of rainbows and discover that in Tulipop, Jellies are responsible for creating them.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends decide to spend the night with Mr Tree under the stars. Fred, however, is terribly afraid of the dark. Despite his inability to sleep, he manages to overcome his fear with the help of his friends.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is reluctant to go outside and play due to the rain, prompting Gloomy to seek a solution. Despite his best intentions, Gloomy inadvertently creates a mixture of sun, rain and snow.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Bubble soar through the sky, astride two butterflies, whilst poor Gloomy is forced to remain on the ground. However, determined to join his friends, Gloomy uses his potion to enlarge a firefly to gigantic proportions.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy's magic makes butterflies enormous, leading to an unexpected ride. Fred and Bubble fly away on giant butterflies, while Gloomy must make do with a slow-moving, lumbering glowbug.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maya the Mermaid's musical practice causes problems with her friend Octavius the Octopus. The two get into a disagreement, and Fred and Gloomy must help mend a friendship.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends hear music from the Forgotten Forest and feel glum. They discover its source and realise that they must cheer up the Weeping Willow to stop its sad music from affecting everyone.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: In the forest, a melody so sorrowful resonates, casting melancholy over all who hear it. The source is Willow, a weeping willow abandoned by his group. Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy offer to play and sing alongside him, lifting his spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends clean up their houses for the Midwinter Munchkin on Midwinter's Eve. While the others get ready, Gloomy's messy house may cause the Midwinter Munchkin to skip his visit.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tulipop and the friends decide to visit Grumpkin. Poor Grumpkin cannot come outside to play. Gloomy and his friends decide to help him spend a day in the sun and thanks to a magic potion they will solve the situation.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is in the swamp and makes friends with a mud monster. Gloomy, Bubble and Maddy are a little scared of this little creature but soon they realise that he is funny and friendly.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Gloomy decide to go to an unexplored territory of Tulipop. Despite their fear of the dark, they encourage each other and discover a beautiful lagoon populated by small lava spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred, Maddy, Bubble and Gloomy go on a picnic in the forest to watch the leaves of the trees change colour. But suddenly the leaves turn blue. This is because the forest elf has lost his colour crystal.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: As winter has begun, the little friends decide to go ice skating. Maddy is not doing very well, but her friends are ready to help her so they can all play together.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tiger Moon falls into the sea, and the whole island must come together to help it find its way home.

programme.title: Tulipop

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: This is the tragic tale of Susan Smith, who shocked the nation in 1994 by fabricating a carjacking to cover up the drowning murders of her two young sons.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly sneaks into a sorority Eden is pledging to find out why she was rejected years ago. Haskell turns the guys' apartment into a pretend AirBnB to attract a woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, over the moon, introduces the gang to her new boyfriend, Congressman Charles Hayward, but they soon begin to question his motives.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Encounter

programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Shannan Gilbert, near Gilgo Beach, New York. The search for Shannan led to the discovery of a total of ten bodies in the scrub brush of Gilgo Beach, leading police to suspect the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Cube Of Sugar

programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: For years a violent predator lurks around Nashville, attacking women in their homes on rainy nights. Investigators' biggest clue is the weather pattern.

programme.desc: In February 1972, police are called to the home of Bryce and Virginia Durham, where they find the couple and their son strangled and partially submerged in their bathtub.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Moves In

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's Mixed Emotions

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Clerical Error
programme.desc: Mork decides to become a priest.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Stark Raving Mork
programme.desc: Mork foolishly picks a fight with Mindy in order to "kiss and make up."

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Vs. Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and Mindy compete to earn a job working for Nelson.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Gets Mindy-itis
programme.desc: As Mindy prepares a formal party for Nelson, Mork discovers he's become allergic to Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dr. Morkenstein
programme.desc: Mork instills human emotions in a robot.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Book of Thoth, a legendary text of magic and wisdom, has inspired Freemasons, Tarot readers, and occultists across centuries. Yet, archaeologists doubt its existence despite its influence on esoteric culture from ancient Egypt to modern times.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Legend has it that in the Amazon jungle lies El Dorado, a mythical city of gold. Colonel Percy Fawcett, believed in its existence and spent years searching. In 1925, he vanished with his son and a friend during an expedition revealing a civilization.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1944 Italy, SS soldiers raid an Italian Count's villa under Himmler's orders to find the Germania, an ancient manuscript by Tacitus. Himmler idealized it as the "Book of Power" to prove Aryan superiority, justifying Nazi atrocities.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Ron Wyatt, a Nashville nurse turned amateur archaeologist at 47, aimed to validate Bible stories. In 1977, he claimed finding Noah’s Ark on Mount Ararat and later dived for Egyptian chariot remains, supporting Moses’ Red Sea crossing.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1924, a girl found a quartz crystal skull in Central America, believing it had telepathic powers. Legend says thirteen such skulls will unlock life’s mysteries. Modern science has debunked their authenticity, despite some being in museums.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Serial Killers
programme.desc: Serial Killers victims are often selected at random. The murders have only one thing in common: the bodies are savagely disfigured. Hunting them leads investigators into a world of darkness.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: MOON SHINE
programme.desc: The International drive to return to the Moon is gathering pace, this multi- nation effort is readying to return, stay and utilise the Lunar assets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Set Course For Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA’S Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe’s Solar probe Mission.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mercury Or Bust
programme.desc: The ESA - JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of Antisemitism
programme.desc: Two of the most powerful Nazis go head to head - Josef Goebbels and Herman Göring.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Berghof Set
programme.desc: Ruthless infighting divides the Nazi leaders at Hitler’s mountain retreat.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Madness of Rudolf Hess
programme.desc: Hitler’s Deputy stakes his reputation on one last desperate gamble.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise and Fall of Reinhard Heydrich
programme.desc: The rise of Reinhard Heydrich: a story of mass murder.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of the Sycophants
programme.desc: Albert Speer: Favouritism, Envy and Betrayal in Hitler’s inner circle.

programme.title: Wild Asia: The Arid Heart
programme.desc: Staying alive in Asia’s barren heartland of desert and dry grasslands is a challenge, yet many animals thrive.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Two Eagles
programme.desc: Two eagles struggle to survive and produce offspring to maintain their species.

programme.title: Wild Asia: Kingdoms Of The Coast
programme.desc: Asia’s shorelines stretch from the world’s most extensive mangrove forests and coral reefs in Indonesia to the sub-arctic coast of northern Russia.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian gets a call from a top Hollywood picture car coordinator and works his magic to get a vintage race car back in action.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian is commissioned to help build a wild, massive mobile floating party island for a prestigious festival in the Nevada desert (Burning Man).

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: A new client comes into the picture with a vintage desire; a hand-built motorcycle in the vein of early Harley Davidson’s, but with a Full Custom twist. And later, Ian pushes the envelope with a cool electric bike build for himself.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: An old client brings in Ian to build a classic 54’ Chevy pickup truck from the ground up with some major custom upgrades.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: One of Ian’s most infamous show cars, Space Junkie, comes back to into the shop in a bizarre turn of events. The gem is in desperate need of rehab and Ian brings it back to life, better than ever, with some major reworking!

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel delivers the fabrication goods as he transplants an old 1948' cab onto a modern roll-off truck and creates one bad-ass trash truck.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember
programme.desc: During the Second World War, 250,000 Canadian women helped to build the arsenal of democracy. These young women met the challenges of factory work and helped to win the Second World War, and by doing so, paved the way for future generations.

programme.title: War Story: Sicily: The First Campaign
programme.desc: The Sicily Campaign began with the largest seaborne invasion in history on 9-10 July 1943. The Allied forces of Britain, Canada, and the United States sought to knock Italy out of the war and attack Germany from the south.

programme.title: War Story: Ortona: The War Inside
programme.desc: The War Inside is a personal retelling of one of the fiercest battles of the Italian Campaign from the searing points of view of Canadian infantrymen, a tanker, a stretcher bearer, and a German paratrooper.

programme.title: War Story: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: The Road to Rome examines the incredible experiences of Canadian veterans, the victories and horrors of armoured combat, and the pivotal value, far too often neglected, of the overall Italian Campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy
programme.desc: In Normandy, the 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion proved itself to be in the vanguard of the best-trained and toughest units in the Allied forces.

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rico & Ja'Mari

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Attack From Above
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Hard or Go Home
programme.desc: It's week five of Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fishing season, and when a sudden storm engulfs the fleet, each captain must decide if the risk of staying out on the water is worth the reward.

programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway
programme.desc: It's week eight of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the midway point of fishing where crews either knuckle down and push hard, or crumble from the grind.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: It's week ten of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and, with only six weeks of fishing left, the competition is heating up.

programme.title: The Crime Business: The Armed Robber
programme.desc: Former armed robbers Bobby Cummines and ‘mad' Frank Cook take us through the minute details of preparation and execution of armed robberies

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Mongrel Mob
programme.desc: The Mongrel Mob are New Zealand’s most feared gang. Heavily tattooed, predominantly Maori and extremely dangerous, the mob recruit men who have spent time in jail or proved themselves by committing violent crimes.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: The Americans
programme.desc: The Americans are a gang that rule fear across the Cape Flats. We join filmmaker Laurens Barnard who has dedicated his time to filming these ruthless criminals and talk to him about his experiences filming the murder of a well known American gangsters

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Salford
programme.desc: The Hacienda is still a name that is renowned for being the pioneer in the UK House scene. It was also remembered for clubbing culture that was destroyed by gang activities.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Gangster Disciples
programme.desc: One of the world’s largest and most organised street gangs based in Chicago the Gangster Disciples. We take a look at how they came to being and how the explosion of cocaine enabled their growth.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Yardies
programme.desc: Since the Yardies came on the scene a little over 20 years ago, they have impacted crime statistics and law enforcement agencies in the US and the UK like no other. We take a look at the most disorganised, organised crime syndicate the world has ever seen

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: The Firm
programme.desc: We get personally escorted around London by one of The Firm’s guvnor’s, Dave Courtney. Better know as The Bermondsey Boy or The Yellow Pages of Crime.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Hells Angels
programme.desc: The World’s oldest and best known motorcycle club has had a particularly bloody period in it’s recent history. We sent a team to find out what went down in “The Great Nordic Biker Wars” of the mid nineties.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Tijuana
programme.desc: this programme takes a look at the real drug lords of Tijuana Mexico. We show how they came to gain power and control from their Columbian counterparts and focus upon the most vicious cartel run by two brutal brothers, The Arellano Felix Organisation.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens and the New World Order 2
programme.desc: Recent discoveries reveal that a highly advanced race of extraterrestrial beings came to Earth in our ancient past, but the shocking realization is that they are still here now, among us and may have a sinister agenda beyond our wildest imaginations.

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: Alien Crash Retrievals
programme.desc: Learn the shocking truth about extraterrestrial beings on planet Earth. World governments and military factions are not only aware of the Alien presence; they may be in communication with alien races.

programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Arthur: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal
programme.desc: It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Tough Customer/Brain's Chess Mess
programme.desc: The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Back/The Ballad Of Buster Baxter
programme.desc: Buster's coming home! The word spreads fast, but so does the fear that Buster will be different. Then, it seems to Buster, not only have his friends changed while he was gone, but they've forgotten all about him! Will he ever fit in again?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur And The Big Riddle/Double Dare
programme.desc: Alex Trebek lends his voice as gameshow host Alex Lebek in this episode which poses the age-old riddle--is winning really everything? What if your friends dared you to skip homework--and then double dared you to skip school?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney reminds Riff and BJ that Christmas is about more than getting gifts. Barney takes Melanie on a trip to the North Pole to deliver her letter in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big As Barney - The Chase
programme.desc: When Ryan notices how much everyone loves Barney, he tries to be just like him; but he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Then Ryan learns that he is special when he's just being himself!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: The Autobots, with Jack and Miko, fall victim to an Energon mine cave-in – and find themselves trapped with Starscream and Megatron!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Partners
programme.desc: Airachnid and Starscream are forced to partner to retrieve a powerful weapon; but upon being captured by Optimus and team, Starscream shockingly reveals that he would rather partner with the Autobots!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: T.M.I.
programme.desc: When Bulkhead's brain is accidentally endowed with the secret formula for synthetic Energon, he becomes an intellectual recluse while the Decepticons hunt him down for the information.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Stronger, Faster
programme.desc: Ratchet, experimenting with synthetic Energon, injects himself with the substance—which makes him a menace to the Decepticons…but also to the Autobots and himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Fall
programme.desc: Megatron's attempt to fulfill an ancient Cybertronian prophecy results in one of our heroes becoming mortally wounded – and leads to a long-awaited rematch.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Rise: Part 1
programme.desc: When Earth becomes plagued by natural disasters, the Autobots come to the horrible realization that Dark Energon is the source of the bizarre events.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Rise: Part 2
programme.desc: Facing the greatest threat to Earth to date, the Autobots team with an unexpected ally.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Rise: Part 3
programme.desc: As the Autobots do battle at the Earth's core, Jack learns more about Optimus' past on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: When a Cybertronian prison ship crashes on Earth, a new team of Autobots, led by Bumblebee, arrives to protect the planet—and the galaxy—from hundreds of escaped Deception fugitives!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Following a mysterious message, BUMBLEBEE returns to Earth with unlikely companions to face a new Decepticon threat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Trust Exercises
programme.desc: Bumblebee and his new allies struggle to find a teamwork dynamic as they protect Crown City from metal-devouring Underbite.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandi & Phil

programme.title: Property Brothers: Leslie & Tim
programme.desc: Since they sold their downtown condo, Leslie and Tim have been living with her parents. And though they both agree it's time to move into a home of their own, she prefers the city while he wants to live in the burbs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kyle & Jackie

programme.title: Property Brothers: Andrew & Phil

programme.title: Property Brothers: Emily & Ken

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Duplicate
programme.desc: Donatello creates an egotistical Clone of himself who stuffs Donatello in a trunk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy and Laa-Laa are out for a walk and Po is riding her scooter, but where is Tinky Winky? When the other Tubbies see him they chase him all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance through Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number five.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children exploring the colour red. Po makes some adjustments on the switch panel and all the lights change to the colour red. Po sees some red clouds and changes the colour of all the flowers to red.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A door appears in Teletubbyland. The Tubbies have great fun opening and closing, knocking on and going through the door.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies sit down to eat some Tubby Custard, but they stop to watch some children buy some different sorts of vegetables. The Teletubbies ask the question – what colour is Tubby Custard?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy a big hug before watching a lady tell a story about four friends. She uses her hands to make actions to tell the story.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky has no time for Tubby Custard before watching some children feed some baby penguins. The Lion & Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Thomas and Jack having fun playing on the beach and building sandcastles. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies are going round and round.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children hanging out their washing. Tinky Winky, Laa-Laa and Po are out walking together when a clothes line appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love playing on the slide. They stop to watch Andy Brown and some children digging in the sand for crabs.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s the team’s first full day in Sunflower Valley and the machines are all a bit nervous of the mammoth job ahead. All except for Muck who is determined to show that he’s not a bit worried. Travis arrives with Bob’s new mobile home.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An observation tower is going to be added next to the Visitor’s centre to provide a scenic view of Sunflower Valley. The scaffolding is raised and Roley prepares a path to connect the tower to the Dome.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s Mr and Mrs Bentley’s twenty fifth wedding anniversary and to celebrate Mr Bentley asks Bob and the gang to build a special summer house. Mrs Bentley is out for the day and the summer house is to be a surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An early morning start for the sunflower valley team, as they are moving logs in preparation for a safety fence around Mr Sabatini’s windmill. Wendy’s off to the sunflower oil factory to help Marjorie with a big delivery.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It is Wendy’s birthday, but she insists she doesn’t want any fuss – such as a surprise party. She heads off to start the day’s work, laying a Heritage Trail around the town, and Bob reveals to the Machines that he is not planning a party.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor. He asks Muck to collect some special tiles from JJ, explaining that they are very fragile and easy to break.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are drilling a special well at their homestead. The well has its own water tank, which needs to be raised from the ground on rocks. Wendy and Scrambler arrive for the first ever time in Sunflower Valley..

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is playing with the Sunflower Valley children; Sunny, Saffron, Carlo and Cassia in the playground. It’s the last day before they have to go back to school in Bobsville and they are all sad to be leaving.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr. Beasley decides to grow pineapples, and the best way top do this is to build a pineapple pit – a special pit, heated by horse manure! Travis wants to help and decides to fetch some horse manure from Farmer Pickles farm in Bobsville as quick as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is repairing a leaking water tank at the school, when he discovers bats in the belfry. He tapes up the tank temporarily, but says the bats will need a new home as they are a protected species.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s just finished tidying his mobile home when Farmer Pickles comes and asks if he’ll help with his Sunflower Harvest. He needs a silo built in which to store the ripe sunflowers before they’re taken to the factory.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s renovating a dilapidated old watermill in Sunflower Valley – it’s going to make flour from Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. After checking that it’s safe, Bob realises that one of the millstones has gone missing. How very odd!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob, Scoop and Skip are helping Mr Beasley to install a new Rockery when Mr Bentley appears to ask for Bob’s help. The Mayor wants to stage an art exhibition, but there are no available venues. Scoop suggests renovating the inside of the Old Mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: After a stormy night, Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts’, while Bob repairs a drainage pipe for Farmer Pickles. A wire fence has been blown away at the farm too, but fixing the pipe takes priority.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new exercise park which Mr Dixon’s brother David, a famous goalkeeper, is going to open. Dizzy tries to cajole Spud into joining in a game of soccer, but uncharacteristically the scarecrow doesn’t want to play.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are installing a bull-rush water recycling system to clean water from Farmer Pickles’ cottage. The clean water will be used to water Farmer Pickles new orchard. Bob explains that everything needs to be built in order – it’s a process.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis has a batch of Doves delivered, to use in his magic act, and asks Bob to build a dovecote for his new birds to live in. Mr Ellis realises that he has to go to work but does not want to leave the birds at home alone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building the road connecting Bob’s mobile home site with the location of the new yard. It’s a big job for Roley, but just as Bob’s explaining the job, a pretty little bird flies overhead clutching some twigs in her beak.

programme.title: 2023 TOUR Championship - Final Round
programme.desc: Watch the final round of the 2023 TOUR Championship, where Viktor Hovland shot a 7-under par 63 to claim his sixth PGA TOUR victory and first FedExCup at East Lake Golf Club in Atlanta, Georgia.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip Charles Hanson visits the solicitors and Charlie Ross finds history in an old packet of cigarettes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hanson buys something he doesn't like and Charlie Ross profits from a most unlikely item en route to auction in Ledbury, Herefordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross takes an expensive gamble and Charles Hanson gets invited to a castle as they head for the winner's enclosure at auction near Winchester.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the next leg of their journey. Starting in Keswick in the heart of the North Lakes in Cumbria, they weave their way towards an auction in Crooklands, in the South Lakes.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Group B Day Two, Rising Stars Week.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Jimmy van Schie joins Tungsten Talk to discuss his impact at the MODUS Super Series and his dedicated fanbase.

programme.title: Rewind
programme.desc: Full session replay of International Pairs Week: Group B, Night 2.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Four Angry Wives, Cabbie Bomber, Martha's Kennel, Wally's Hidden River, VA Cop Killer and Update: Goldie's Girl.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Daughter Seeks Justice, Butch Cassidy, Pizza Man, Ghost Boy, Update: Amish Hostage Murder and Big Mac Shootout.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Skull Duggery, Deadly RX & UD, Children of Heaven and Not Home for the Holidays & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fatherly Love, Good Samaritan Abductor, Halloween Party Death, Update: Meredith's Mother, Carwash Kidnap and Children from Heaven.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Anastasia (Pts. 1, 2 & 3) & UD, Jail Family & UD and Killer Boyfriend & UD.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Southern Organs
programme.desc: A dedicated psychic puts his reputation on the line to track down two con men in Scotland.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A serial killer is loose in Baton Rouge, police believe they’re looking for a youngish white man driving a white pick up truck.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jacqueline Poole
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Jacqueline Poole is assaulted and strangled in her home. The police find her body 48 hours later and launch their investigation.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green
programme.desc: Mark Green disappears one night without a trace. Police are stumped. There is no evidence. Diane Lazarus, a psychic in a nearby town, is holding a reading.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Home After Dark
programme.desc: Seventeen year-old Tyson Efird disappears from the parking lot of the grocery store where he works in Malvern, Arkansas.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Finding Amy
programme.desc: In Portland Maine, a young woman named Amy St. Laurent goes out one evening with friends. At a bar she meets a stranger named Jeff.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fear Factory
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Claremont, New Hampshire to investigate a former shoe and furniture factory, the Topstone Mill. What was once an abandoned space has now become a restaurant and bar...

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Heir Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Hampton Falls, New Hampshire to investigate the Governors Mansion, a property Steve has investigated before with a local team.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Pioneers
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gloucester, Massachusetts to investigate Hammond Castle.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Higher Dead/ucation
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bowling Green, Kentucky to investigate Western Kentucky University's three stories of death and terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt1
programme.desc: The formidable visage of Guys Cliff House, a once great home, is awe inspiring, as are the stories pf paranormal activity within. Now home to the Masonic fraternity it is home to two temples and many lodges and chapters.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt2
programme.desc: The lower Temple in this once great, but now ruined castle, is steeped in history and tales pf ghostly happenings. Stuart investigates a room that is said to house multiple spirits and feels something is watching him in the dark.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison Pt1
programme.desc: With paranormal activity of every kind, Dorchester Prison isn’t for the faint hearted. Karl takes on the prison block where aggressive phantoms and poltergeists are said to roam.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison Pt2
programme.desc: With Karl in the main prison block, Stuart checks out the isolation unit, with dramatic results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Shire Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the courtroom of one of Dorchester’s most historical buildings and is suddenly surrounded by unexplained occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Shire Hall P2
programme.desc: Under the main building of Dorchester Shire Hall there is a warren of tunnels and cells. Stuart enters this area that is said to house many a phantom.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: York Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of York Castle Museum is almost endless as are the paranormal stories attached to it. Karl enters the street and cells with dramatic effect.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil
programme.desc: Jay Yaple persuades his wife that Enfield, CT, is the perfect place for them. After a series of unexplained events, Jay discovers the house has a dark history of mysterious deaths. Anyone who attempts to come to their aid is driven away by the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: Black Magic
programme.desc: During the renovation of her 150-year-old Pennsylvania home, Debbie Guy accepts the old house has a ghost and they will have to live with it. But when family members are tormented by an evil entity, Debbie seeks the help of paranormal investigators.

programme.title: A Haunting: Face Of Evil
programme.desc: Joy, a working mother of three, assumes a girl's weekend at a haunted plantation will be a pleasant change of pace. But after she returns, her youngest child's sleep is shattered by the ominous presence of a dark phantom.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway to Hell
programme.desc: Bobby Mackey has heard tales that the river by his club draws Satanists to the area.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: What Happens In Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly get married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot.

programme.title: 30 Days until I'm Famous
programme.desc: A Latina working in Los Angeles as a messenger is randomly discovered and fashioned into a pop music star.

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: A Warm December
programme.desc: An African-American doctor falls in love with the niece of an African ambassador during his vacation in London, but it turns out that she is suffering from a rare terminal illness.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: A Warm December
programme.desc: An African-American doctor falls in love with the niece of an African ambassador during his vacation in London, but it turns out that she is suffering from a rare terminal illness.

programme.title: Hate Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Ken wants justice for his brother Bill, who was killed by a notorious gunman named Stevens for a goldmine map. The gunman is arguing with gangster Malone about the map. A deadly cat and mouse game between the three men ensues.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Horse Thief
programme.desc: Wyatt jails the McLowery brothers for robbery. Soon afterwards, however, he is enraged to learn that, because the McLowerys work for Old Man Clanton, they've been released by Sheriff Behan.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Billy Bucket, Incorporated
programme.desc: An old prospector stumbles into a saloon saying he has been robbed and murdered. He is suffering from a shot that creased his head and mumbling that he had $50,000 in gold stolen from him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Winning Streak
programme.desc: Morgan Earp has been having a streak of good luck in Tombstone's gambling houses but Wyatt wants to get him to quit while he's still ahead and return to his old self.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Miss Sadie
programme.desc: The wife of a wounded outlaw takes him to Tombstone for medical attention as he has decided to go straight. Earp learns who he is but doesn't trust him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Johnny Ringo's Girl
programme.desc: Ringo's girlfriend is trying to get him to turn his life around, so he goes to Old Man Clanton and tells him he wants to leave the gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Too Perfect Crime
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in a stable but the weapon used is unique. The primary suspect appears to be the fiancée of the dead man's daughter.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: He's My Brother
programme.desc: Marshal Pritchard is severely wounded in front of Doc Goodfellow. Doc tells Earp that he believes the shooter may be mentally unstable and not responsible for his actions.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: The Big Fight
programme.desc: Tien Peng and Cheung Ching-ching play the leaders of a rebel group of Chinese kung fu fighters in a Japanese occupied town at the height of the war.

programme.title: Eat My Dust!
programme.desc: Darlene's into going fast, Hoover's into Darlene, but when they both get into a red-hot race car, the reckless fun accelerates into a trunk-full of hot pursuits.

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to prove his theory that a series of unexplained catastrophes are the result of powerful winds found in the upper atmosphere coming down to ground level.

programme.title: Runner, Runner
programme.desc: A college student (Justin Timberlake) takes the ultimate gamble when he goes to Costa Rica to confront the online gaming tycoon (Ben Affleck) who cheated him out of his winnings.

programme.title: The Wrong Girl
programme.desc: Sophia is an ideal 17 year old student, who quickly strikes up a friendship with Grace, the new girl in school. But their friendship takes a sinister turn when Grace begins disrupting the lives of Sophia and her family.

programme.title: Her Boyfriend’s Secret
programme.desc: INSPIRED BY TRUE EVENTS - Renowned interior designer Melissa is drawn into a relationship with a man who has a secret life -- another wife and family. She soon meets another innocent victim and learns her man is more than duplicitous, he’s a killer!

programme.title: Life Like
programme.desc: An idealistic, attractive young couple acquires a stunning, life-like robot for guilt-free help; but, as the three grow closer, their perception of humanity will be altered forever.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: Dark Star is a sci-fi/comedy film directed by John Carpenter and co-written with Dan O'Bannon. The "Beachball with Claws" segment of the film was reworked by Dan O'Bannon into the science fiction-horror film Alien.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: Magical Adventures in the Forbidden City
programme.desc: In another world Abigail lives in a city whose borders were closed years ago because of a disease. She takes us on a magical adventure, rising against the forces in command and shows how being brave and following your heart can show anything is possible.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: Captain Sabertooth
programme.desc: The orphan boy Pinky follows the Captain on an exciting and dangerous journey across the big oceans to the kingdom of Lama Rama, hunting for a treasure and the answer to who is Pinky's father.

programme.title: The Ape
programme.desc: Dr. Bernard Adrian is a kindly mad scientist who seeks to cure a young woman's polio. He needs spinal fluid from a human to complete the formula for his experimental serum.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When Vern decides to use his expertise in the dark arts to grow his own "familiar", Cally and Lance use the comic clues to find it before the it hatches.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Succumbing to temptation, Lance joins a group of older kids in a midnight graveyard game only to place himself, Cally and Sage in great danger.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance discovers that Doyle, the owner of Gamerz Cave, belongs to a mysterious secret society: and Cally must face a frightening change in Jack’s personality.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: After being humiliated by Dizzy in front of the entire school Lance exacts his revenge on him in a paintball game that turns ugly.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When the latest issue of “Dark Oracle” predicts a disastrous outcome for her fashion show Cally attempts to take control of her destiny.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: A community scavenger hunt pits Cally and Lance against each other. Lance tries to gain the upper hand using clues from the latest issue of the Dark Oracle.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When Cally and Annie have a falling out, Cally befriends Claudia, the cool new girl in school, but soon learns the hard way that her friendship was disastrously misplaced.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: As a result of rigorous testing Lance is chosen to become the newest recruit of Doyle’s secret society; Nemo attempts to escape Gamerz.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Lady in the Lake
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a twisted fairy tale when a woman in a ball gown is found at the bottom of the pond outside Belvedere Castle in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate what appears to be a fatal car-jacking.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: With the help of D B Russell, Mac is able to identify who kidnapped Christine.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team unravels three twisted tales of love in a trio of separate murder cases.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A riot threatens to break out at a Manhattan precinct.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder online while participating in a webchat with a stranger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Sudden Death
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must search through Miami's most elite guest list to find her killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder suspect tries to throw the CSIs off his trail.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a man during his ex-wife's divorce party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a flight attendant is murdered, a pilot, a marshal and stalker are all in the frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a finalist in a reality show in murdered, the team look at the other contestants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As Delko hovers between life and death, he experiences a flashback to 1997.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: With potentially less than a day to attempt to prevent the next murders, the CSI team must quickly shake off their shock that the true miniature killer is not the late Ernie Edward Dell, who committed suicide after confessing to the slayings.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom's quip that two missing young lovers may have run off to Mexico is soon quashed by the discovery of drops of blood by the boy's vacant parking spot at the high school.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While processing the house where several showgirls were murdered, Sara is haunted by the terrified eyes and cryptic dying words of the sixth victim she discovers.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Greg is forced to again contend with the hostile mother and brother of the hoodlum he killed in self-defense several months ago when the CSI team discovers that the brother is involved in a new murder case.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Grissom and the rest of the CSIs are out investigating new cases, Hodges leads Archie, Henry, Mandy and Wendy to believe that Grissom wants them to secretly band together that evening in an attempt to solve the four miniature killer cases.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In their attempt to identify the murderer of a has-been boxer who lived among a group of prostitutes who detested him, the CSIs must establish which of several life-threatening acts against him in one night actually killed him.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.

programme.title: Scorpion: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must find a boy from Ralph's class who goes missing on a field trip after he accidentally has a run-in with a deadly criminal. Also, Toby gets closer to finding out the identity of Happy's husband.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Before Halloween, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a deep, vast cave system in order to prevent a bat population from destroying the North America ecosystem.

programme.title: Scorpion: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: On Election Day, as democracy hangs in the balance, Team Scorpion is called on when someone tries to throw the U.S. presidential election into chaos.

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: A magic crystal leads a college student (Josh Charles) and an adventurer (Rutger Hauer) on a surreal quest to save the world.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides (Kyle MacLachlan) leads the fight for vital spice on a desert planet in the year 10191.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, two special operatives (Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne) race against time to save the diverse city of Alpha from a dark force that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin and his Merry Men set out to dethrone a self-appointed dictator who has seized power over the commoners.

programme.title: Captain Boycott
programme.desc: A selfish property owner named Captain Boycott dispossesses the townspeople and leaves them without hope. But when a passionate farmer organises a nonviolent rebellion, he proves that the Irish people are willing to fight for their rights.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevenson's hero David Balfour joins rebel Alan Breck Stewart in 18th-century Scotland.

programme.title: Medium: A Cure For What Ails You
programme.desc: Allison has visions of a friend of Scanlon and Lynn DiNovi dying in a home mishap.

programme.title: Medium: Car Trouble
programme.desc: Allison meets Meghan Doyle, Joe's new business partner. Meanwhile, her old car stops working and Joe surprises her with a nice looking used car.

programme.title: Medium: Being Joey Carmichael
programme.desc: Allison has dreams that help Scanlon in his search to find out who killed a wealthy local drug dealer.

programme.title: Medium: Drowned World
programme.desc: In the fourth season finale, Allison tries to help a young couple who thinks their house is haunted, but her efforts result in murder.

programme.title: Medium: Soul Survivor
programme.desc: Devalos' friend's sister is murdered and Allison tries to help solve the crime. Her dreams don't seem to make sense though, as they keep implicating the friend's first husband, who died two years ago, as the murderer.

programme.title: Medium: Things To Do In Phoenix When You're Dead
programme.desc: Allison dreams of a ghost who was a witness to several murders. Meanwhile, Ariel has a strange reaction to an assignment in health class.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU team is deployed to a hospital to end a stand-off between gang members and a man trying to protect his wounded brother.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A wave of terrorist bombs shuts down the city, pushing Team One to the limit and putting one of their own on the line.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A bitter child custody battle sparks a critical incident and the SRU must use a risky “rolling roadblock” maneuver to rescue the children.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must locate and rescue a politician before a vengeful radio shock jock kills him on the air.

programme.title: Where Hands Touch
programme.desc: In 1944, a 15-year-old girl, daughter of a white German mother and a black African father, meets a member of the Hitler Youth. They become bound by the realisation of the horrors being committed around them.

programme.title: Mr Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: He's a widower in Paris who speaks no French. She's a dance instructor less than half his age. Can they become a family, or will his estranged adult children halt the friendship?

programme.title: 6 Below
programme.desc: An adrenaline seeking snowboarder gets lost in a massive winter storm in the back country of the High Sierras. Starring: Josh Hartnett, Mira Sorvino, Sarah Dumont. It is based on the book Crystal Clear by Eric LeMarque and Davin Seay.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Pleasant Screams
programme.desc: Strict teacher Felix Purdy has always been tough on his students, particularly on introverted dreamer Daryl Kregman.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: While the Cat's Away

programme.desc: Young Randy is reluctant to accompany his Uncle Ned on a fishing trip. / Delinquents Eddie and Herman have a bad habit of stealing parts for their hot rod from cars on the street.

programme.desc: The drovers protect a young woman fleeing with her child from the family of her dead husband.

programme.desc: The story of the Marchioness; a pleasure boat that collided with dredger Bowbelle and sank within minutes resulting in the loss of 51 lives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Baker Street Bachelors

programme.title: The Scarlet Claw

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An abandoned baby is kidnapped and the detectives must find the baby and his father.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client
programme.desc: Sir Charles Farnsworth is found dead in his mysterious Farnsworth Castle. It turns out that Farnsworth had a clause inserted in this will that his death, no matter what the apparent cause, would be investigated by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The New Detectives: Web of Clues

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner Investigator
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: 48 Hours: Perfectly Executed - Part 2

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 1960 murder of Irena Garza, in McAllen, Texas, and the efforts that family members and police have taken to bring the suspect, a Roman Catholic priest, to trial for the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Hell and Back

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 2

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.
