programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders arrive at the conclusion of a political rally and Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) becomes involved in a wild scandal involving the president (guest star Eric Pierpoint) of the United States.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in Maggie's (Kari Wuhrer) hometown, the Sliders discover that her double was a decorated astronaut, presumed dead from a mission to Mars.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land in a world where internal combustion engines are outlawed; Mallory (Robert Floyd) falls for an employee (guest star Lisa Akey) of a major gas company and leader of an outlaw biker gang.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) has hallucinations about Wade (guest star Sabrina Lloyd) and eventually enters a vortex that leads the Sliders to a Kromagg military complex where she is being held.

programme.desc: It's 2012 and drug dealer Dale Cregan murders police officers Nicola Hughes and Fiona Bone. Dermot Murnaghan investigates.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jeremy Bamber
programme.desc: An investigation into Jeremy Bamber's brutal murder of his family in Essex, which occurred in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Suzy Lamplugh
programme.desc: A look at the case of estate agent Suzy Lamplugh, who showed a client around a house in Fulham in July 1986 and was never seen again. Dermot Murnaghan hosts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)

programme.title: Moesha: Mis-Directed Study
programme.desc: Moesha is flying high after she gets a job tutoring one of the basketball team’s star players until she finds out what kind of game he really wants to play.

programme.title: Moesha: Not My Pumpkin
programme.desc: Things get tense at the Mitchell house when Frank discovers Moesha has been taking birth control pills – and he’s the last to know.

programme.title: Moesha: Just Above My Head
programme.desc: Moesha finds her history teacher’s remarks racially offensive, but fears that confronting him might affect her grade and cost Niecy her scholarship.

programme.title: Moesha: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste

programme.title: Moesha: Isn’t She Lovely?

programme.title: Moesha: Unappreciated Interest
programme.desc: Dorian pulls an illegal scam involving Frank’s credit card and makes matters worse by lying about it, behavior that could have dramatic consequences.

programme.title: Moesha: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With Dee sick in bed with a bad cold, Moesha offers to prepare the Thanksgiving feast but finds herself engaged in a fierce cooking competition with Hakeem’s mother.

programme.title: Moesha: To Sleep – Perchance To Dream
programme.desc: Moesha starts having recurring romantic dreams about Hakeem, giving her second thoughts about their friendship and about sharing a room with him and Niecy on an upcoming ski trip.

programme.title: Moesha: He Doth Protest Too Much
programme.desc: Moesha discovers that some of her college classes are more difficult than she thought; she has a hard time in Chemistry and reluctantly agrees to let Niecy tutor her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart and Holly convince Margo to hold her wedding at their restaurant. Haskell, still desperately in love with Margo, tries to stop it.

programme.title: The Exes: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly’s assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he’s got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit, because he used Phil’s (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn’t speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly (Kristen Johnston) has to face her cheating ex fiancé for the first time since they broke up, she enlists the guys' help to prove to him he lost the best thing he ever had.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Burning Obsession
programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game
programme.desc: 1995 - Houston, Texas. A lonely man calls a dating service and gets more than he bargained for when he is met at gunpoint and robbed by his “dates”. The women, dubbed “Thelma & Louise”, lure men with the promise of sex but then drug and rob them.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: In a Toronto suburb during the summer of 1996, a man leaves home for a business trip. He doesn’t return. Fearing foul play, his desperate wife finally reports her husband’s disappearance to the police.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Audrey Jouannet Case
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Jeanie Loves Mork
programme.desc: Mindy takes a job writing the Miss Lonely Hearts newspaper column and unknowingly encourages Jean to pursue a romantic relationship with Mork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Way Mork Were
programme.desc: Fred confesses that he's having marital difficulties, so Mork and Mindy relay stories of their troubled times.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Putting the Ork Back In Mork (Part 2)
programme.desc: It could be Mork's last night on Earth when an ancient Orkan elder who looks like a ten-year-old boy arrives with the news that Mork must return to Ork for forecycling because he has picked up too many Earthly ways.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Never-Never Land
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork the Prankster
programme.desc: Spaceman Mork gets so cosmically carried away with pulling practical jokes that he surprises Mindy by assembling her jeep in their living room right over Mr. Bickley's apartment - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's New Look
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork and The Bum Rap
programme.desc: Naive Mork puts on his own out-of-this-world telethon to help Mindy raise charity funds, but is such a funny failure at fund-raising that he turns to his own outrageous brand of panhandling to come up with the needed money.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: There's A New Mork In Town
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: It’s one of the most powerful and enduring myths ever created. The Garden of Eden. One maverick scholar, Dr Juris Zarins sets out to prove its existence.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is a story of one man’s obsession to find a lost Spanish Galleon loaded with treasure. He risked everything – and faced terrible personal tragedy in his quest.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A young archaeologist risks everything in his quest to find one of the world’s greatest treasures – the fabled lost library of Ivan the Terrible.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Mysterious and bizarre deaths happen when an amateur prospector searches for lost Aztec treasure. Is this the curse of Montezuma’s Treasure at work?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Forensic pathologist Dr Philippe Charlier, known to the French as the “Indiana Jones of the graveyards” faces his biggest challenge yet: to uncover the truth behind the remains of France’s most famous daughter – Joan of Arc.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: When a British Spy and adventurer goes on a quest to find the mythical Labyrinth, he uncovers a secret that rewrites history…

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Desert Monsoon
programme.desc: Enlisting the help of fellow storm chaser R.J. Evans, George heads to Arizona to photograph spectacular lightning storms triggered by the desert monsoon season. R.J. however is known as "America's noisiest athiest" for his free-thought radio show.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Monsoon
programme.desc: In India's monsoon season George wades through waist-deep water in Bombay and leach-filled waterfalls in Goa, finds people being swept away by rivers, and rebuilding bridges. He experiences an intense annual Hindu celebration.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Costa Rica
programme.desc: George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down white water rivers in full flood, rappels down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Iceland: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: George meets President of Iceland Ólafur Grímsson who spearheaded use of geothermal power; visits Blue Lagoon and geysers; explores volcanically active Haimaey Island and climbs an iceberg calving off the glaciers at Vatnajokull Lagoon.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Avalanches
programme.desc: Whenever there is unstable snow and gravity, gravity always wins. George travels to the Rocky Mountains to learn about how to stay alive in the back country.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Tornadoes
programme.desc: George embarks on his annual pilgrimage to the "Tornado Alley" area of the central U.S. to guide groups of people who want to witness the brute force of tornadoes in action

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: STAR LIGHT, STAR BRIGHT
programme.desc: The two current science missions to our star; the sun have made great leaps forward in the science of how stars work, how they generate solar winds and how they affect their orbiting planets

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Emissaries
programme.desc: Our solar system is vast, from our own star the Sun to Earth is nearly 150 million kilometers or 1 Astronomical Unit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity

programme.title: Hitler's People: Total War

programme.title: Wildest Islands

programme.title: Wild Asia: In The Realm Of The Red Ape

programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel makes the ultimate shop van out of a 1949 International milk truck.

programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel transforms a 1948 Packard into a street cruising led sled.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Rogers Pass

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Elk Dummy

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wolf Creek
programme.desc: Wardens patrol the Wolf Creek area of Montana for illegal hunting activity. Elsewhere, Wardens conduct a mule deer decoy operation.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sheffield, Windsor Revisits
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkies Deborah and Justin Beeley had more stuff than they could cope with while Matt Rushworth's entire life could be squeezed into his well travelled backpack. Could Phil and Kirstie find fitting homes for both of them?

programme.title: Arthur: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's been feeling low and no one can figure out why. Luckily, Buster Baxter is on the case! With Arthur out of town, Buster is on the hunt for a new best friend, but he only wants to play games HIS way. Will Buster learn to compromise?

programme.title: Arthur: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur
programme.desc: An army of lice has descended on the heads of Lakewood Elementary. Who or what is strong enough to defeat them? What if you could be Arthur for a day? View Arthur's life through his very own eyes for this special episode.

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee
programme.desc: Poor Sue Ellen has lost the one thing she's never without--her diary. Then, Arthur's hurt his knee but won't tell Mom--because then she'd know he'd been playing down at the dump , where he was NOT allowed to go.

programme.title: Arthur: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears
programme.desc: The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!

programme.title: Arthur: The Contest/Prove It
programme.desc: What would happen if Arthur and his friends entered a contest to write stories for their favorite TV show? Then, look out world, D.W. has discovered science! But D.W.'s new-found passion proves that a little knowledge is a dangerous thing.

programme.title: Arthur: 1001 Dads/Prunella's Prediction
programme.desc: When Buster insists that he will miss the Father's Day picnic because he has other plans, Arthur is convinced that he's really sad and embarrassed about his parents’ divorce. And Prunella predicts a gift of flashpants, the hot new fashion.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Underwear/Francine Frensky, Olympic Rider
programme.desc: Arthur thinks it's hilarious when Binky Barnes' pants split during class--until he starts having nightmares about it happening to him. Then, Francine secretly dreams of being an Olympic equestrienne, but first she has to learn to ride.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Horns George/Bleep
programme.desc: George is inspired to write and perform his own blues song when he's introduced to the music of Koko Taylor. And, D.W. overhears a mysterious word she doesn’t know the meaning of. Can D.W. risk the consequences of blurting out <"BLEEP!">?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an Art Show project that Melanie has made. A Park Kid named Myra has decided she doesn't like her name.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns a lesson about bragging when, playing superhero CAPTAIN PICKLES, he tells everyone that he can leap over the moon!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Infected by a Decepticon’s toxin, Bumblebee regresses to the maturity of a youngster, leaving the team essentially leaderless, chasing an escaped fugitive, and trying to keep tabs on the hyperactive lieutenant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Out of Focus
programme.desc: The Bee team finds itself caught in the middle of a feud between rival bounty hunters, who are both out to claim a bounty on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sideways
programme.desc: Bee tries to keep his team from distraction as they fight MALODOR and his Skunkticon posse, while Optimus, in the realm of the Primes, undergoes a dangerous test administered by MICRONUS.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Even Robots Have Nightmares
programme.desc: Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like CLAMPDOWN, jailed for the very same crime back on Cybertron, before he can join Steeljaw’s Pack.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Some Body, Any Body
programme.desc: Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon NIGHTSTRIKE, who plunges the team members into their worst fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing
programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Champ
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Trouble With Fixit
programme.desc: An attempt to fix the ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Lock Out
programme.desc: After Steeljaw and his Pack commandeer the Scrapyard and its defense while the Bee Team is away, our heroes must find a way back in – or face an army of freed Decepticon prisoners.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Similarly Different
programme.desc: When Dinobot Scowl goes on a rampage, Grimlock briefly ponders a return to old habits, but comes to terms with the fact that not all Dinobots are good-guys.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high tech objects. This is a case of absolute urgency. Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered a truly wild new game, an augmented reality programme on the ranger's digital tablet. Grizzy confiscates this toy and becomes a fan of the salmon fishing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The only edible food item left in the ranger's cabin is a salmon stuck inside a block of ice. Starving, Grizzy decides to melt the ice with the blow dryer. Only the Lemmings are already using it for their latest rocket game in the piping system.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have unearthed a box filled with birthday fountains of light that spit forth giant bursts of sparks. They have a blast, but their new game is not really compatible with a bear's nap.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's last jar of chocolate spread has been pinched by the Lemmings, who are savouring it in secret.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Wedged in his sofa to relieve his aching back, Grizzy baulks at getting up. He designs clever strategies to do everything from a distance, including confiscating the Lemming's radio-controlled toy robot transformer, which he will use as a butler.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The vibrations created by Grizzy's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzy changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a birthday piñata in the ranger's living room. The idea of bursting open a papier-mache statue with a bat as it says in the instructions pleases him.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Inside a mysterious cave, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a magical Game of the Goose. The events displayed in the squares that the players land on come true in real life.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is bothered by an object stuck in between the sofa cushions. It's a big fur lemming puppet glove and the Lemmings believe that the puppet is a Super Lemming who's stronger than Grizzy and start to obey it.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the ranger's cabin, which was entirely redecorated for the occasion.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When the last jar of chocolate spread they were fighting over sinks to the bottom of the river, Grizzy and the Lemmings have no choice but to dive in to recover it. But to their great surprise, they discover you can't breathe in water.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a strange figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: While salmon fishing on the riverbank, Grizzy hauls in an unusual catch: an old hand mirror straight out of a fairytale; instead of showing the reflection of the person who holds it, the mirror shows an idealized vision of his surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: In a casing that fell from a circus caravan, the Lemmings find a magic stick that can enchant objects and make them come alive.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy calls upon his fishing instincts to seduce the she-bear, but only succeeds in making a fool of himself. When he sees the Lemmings riding a magnificent wild salmon like rodeo cowboys, he tries to steal theirs.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo has to go through an old friend before flying off to find Scarlemagne and save her father; it is time learn Timbercat survival skills.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo hitches a ride in search of the Chevre Sisters, hoping to tap her inner strength. Scarlemagne turns to Lio for help; the cheese sees all.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo and the gang embark on mission to Cappuccino's Mute brunch spot to reconnect with an old enemy.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun falling over. The Teletubbies watch some children go swimming with Stephanie.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a figure of 8 round the hills and then watch as some children visit a pier. The children look at the sea and watch some men fishing from the end of the pier.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a walking dance. They stop to watch a group of children are riding on a rickshaw. In Teletubbyland, Po is riding her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa fetches the others to watch a little girl called Catherine play with her toy farm. A magical new event happens in Teletubbyland – Bo Peep has lost her sheep and doesn’t know where to find them.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand – on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree and under a cloud. But each time they stand under the cloud it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have their favourite things, but where's Po's scooter? The Teletubbies and a group of children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty buzzy bee.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children dancing while King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys play 'See Saw Majory Daw'. Po has fun going up and down the slide. The Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having some Tubby Custard when they stop to watch some children who are going strawberry picking.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy and older friend playing a tune on a piano. In Teletubbyland, a piano appears. Tinky Winky and Po both have great fun bashing away at the keys, but when they play nicely, they play a lovely tune.

programme.title: Knights of Can-A-Lot
programme.desc: Bob, Wendy and the team get a big surprise when Bob's father Robert comes to visit. When stern Ms Chalmers from the National Heritage asks Bob to renovate the old castle a case of mistaken identity leaves Bob’s father in charge!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a blistering hot day on Sunflower Valley. Bob and Wendy have got to finish building their workshop – making the workbenches and installing the power tools – it’s an inside job so the machines all get the day off.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is demolishing an old house, and sends the floorboards and roof tiles for recycling. As he finishes the job, he gets a call from Mr Bentley who wants him to renovate the museum’s annexe, where Mr Ellis plans to exhibit the work of local artists.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop is keen to enter the town’s snowman competition, but a burst pipe outside Mr Sabatini’s needs fixing. Scoop is anxious when he sees the snowman that Mr Sabatini has made for the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is about to declare his Sunflower Oil business open, but there’s just one more job that he needs Bob to do. He needs a depot to store all the bottles of oil.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An old Willow tree has toppled over and needs to be chopped down. Lofty and Bob are going to make it safe and use the wood for other things. Meanwhile Travis and Sumsy wonder why they haven’t got a shelter of their own like Bob’s machines.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is tiling a roof and calls at JJ’s yard to pick up the materials. But there is only one pallet of the requisite red tiles in stock, so JJ promises to send the remainder of the order as soon as his delivery arrives.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning and there’s a strange creature in Sunflower Valley. First of all it visits the Homestead and then Scarecrow Cottage scaring Sumsy and Travis. It’s something big and hairy, but gets frightened away by Scrambler carrying Baz.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today’s the day that the machines get to build their brand new shelter. It’s going to be built into the side of a hill and made using found materials. Lofty, who slept outside at the old yard, decides that he’d like a place in the new shelter.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day, as the team are building Bob’s new workshop at his new yard. Scoop is desperate to get stuck in and beavers about doing everything he can to help. Bob needs some old floorboards collecting from Bobsville, and sends Scoop to pick them up.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a goat run for Farmer Pickles new goat – Giddy. It’s Travis’s job to collect Giddy from Meg MacDonald the goat breeder. Spud teases Travis about being slow and Travis resolves to collect the goat very quickly.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Wendy is making a floral display for the town square while Bob repairs a fence in Farmer Pickles’ field. Meanwhile, Spud comes across Mrs Percival putting up posters for the school play – The Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are building a special flat-packed eco-home for Marjorie. When Muck and Benny spot Marjorie’s canvas tent and Spud’s straw-house, they wonder what else houses can be made from.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang leave to convert a house into two separate flats. Mr Bentley, meanwhile, has been left in charge of The Mayor’s dog.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot, so Bob and crew will have to use some smelly chemicals to fix it. As these will affect Mr Fothergill’s allergies, he goes to his sister’s for the day. But she doesn’t get on with Hamish, his pet parrot.

programme.title: Mega Machines: The Movie

programme.title: 2017 Travelers Championship

programme.title: Chris Gotterup Wins Myrtle Beach Classic

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a brand-new road trip with old hand Charlie Ross and a new star addition to the roster: Glasgow girl Natasha Raskin. Beginning with the glories of the coastal southwest, they end up at auction in Ottery St Mary in Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On today's trip Charlie Ross and the new girl, Natasha Raskin, are making for an auction in the Hampshire village of Swanmore but starting out in the famous naval city of Portsmouth.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through the trip, Natasha Raskin and Charlie Ross begin the day in Berkhamsted, heading for an auction in the Dorset town of Christchurch.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Today finds Charlie Ross and Natasha Raskin in Farnham in Surrey, on their way to an auction in Towcester, Northamptonshire. Charlie is still in the lead, but can the rookie catch him up before they head into their final leg?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the end of the road for Charlie Ross and Natasha Raskin as they set off from Ashby De La Zouche in Leicestershire. With only a few pounds separating them, who will win at the climactic auction in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new week and a new pairing as Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning hit the road on the hunt for antique treasures. They begin their epic adventure in Ford, aiming for their first auction in Leyburn, North Yorkshire.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Streets
programme.desc: Hidden underground for years in Keighley West Yorkshire. Ghost Dimension investigate haunted Victorian Streets, used during the war as bombing shelters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Crooked House
programme.desc: Deep in Cheshire Ghost Dimension explore a house full of ghostly activity and paranormal goings on. Used to house troops during WW2 as a medical unit.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker in Nantwich. Something sinister and paranormal seems to be causing havoc inside of the building and tonight it unleashes powerful activity

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Barrow Green H17 Anti-Aircraft Battery build to protect the Liverpool Docks and general area and a former prisoner of war camp, holds some sinister secrets and Ghost Dimension uncover paranormal activity dating back to WW2. What will be caught tonight?

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Prescription For Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bartonville, Illinois to investigate the Peoria Asylum.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Permanent Residents
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Cortland, New York to investigate The 1890 House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: All Ghosts On Deck
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Louisville, Kentucky to investigate one of the oldest operating steamboats in the United States, The Belle of Louisville.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts From Hale
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Coventry, Connecticut to investigate the Nathan Hale Homestead. Nathan Hale was an American Patriot who fought in the Revolutionary War and was executed by the Britishfor being a spy.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Scream Park
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Sylvan Beach, New York where the new owner of a historic amusement park finds himself in the middle of a mystery.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Bunker
programme.desc: Gregg enters the bunker for the first time and feels its energy. Has he caught the voice of the mysterious woman that some believe was murdered there?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Eden Camp Museum
programme.desc: Once a prison camp during WWII, Eden Camp is now a museum housing many an artefact and many a ghost. Karl enters the cottage to face the spirits that are said to haunt this once family home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hickleton Hall
programme.desc: Once a grand mansion, this huge property is now very much passed it previous grandeur. Stuart investigates the long empty corridors alone and something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart head to Hack Green Bunker and witness, first hand, the paranormal activity that regularly occurs there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Charlton House
programme.desc: Karl investigates Carlton house library for the first time and quickly realises that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl enters Borwick Hall for the first time as he investigates the upper floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P2
programme.desc: Our investigation into Borwick Hall continues as Stuart investigates the middle floors.

programme.desc: In 2012, Olivia and Jesse Barbour move into their dream home with five-year-old daughter Marie. Soon after, Marie makes her first friend in the neighborhood, a boy named Jackson. Olivia is thrilled until she realizes Jackson is really an imaginary friend.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll

programme.title: A Haunting: Legend Trippers

programme.title: A Haunting: The Dark Side

programme.title: A Haunting: Child’s Play
programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.
